# Changelog

- [Replace 166 static resource files with URL catalog + tool calls](#replace-166-static-resource-files-with-url-catalog--tool-calls)
- [Merge 48 per-resource constraints into single file](#merge-48-per-resource-constraints-into-single-file)

# Details

## Replace 166 static resource files with URL catalog + tool calls

Per PR #1244 review section 3, replaced the `references/resources/` directory (166 files across 48 services) with a rewritten `references/resources.md` that serves as the resource catalog.

The new catalog has per-category tables with ARM type, API version, CAF prefix, naming scope, region category, and documentation URL tables (Bicep reference, service overview, naming rules, additional docs) for all 48 resources.

Updated `research.md` Step 4 to direct tool calls (`mcp_bicep_get_az_resource_type_schema`, `microsoft_docs_search`, `microsoft_docs_fetch`) instead of loading local files. Added `mcp_bicep_get_az_resource_type_schema` to SKILL.md MCP Tools table. Updated `verification.md` to reference the tool-based workflow.

Bumped skill version `1.0.0` → `1.1.0`.

Files: `resources.md` (rewrite), `research.md` (edit), `SKILL.md` (edit), `verification.md` (edit), `resources/` (delete 166 files).

## Merge 48 per-resource constraints into single file

Created `references/constraints.md` (589 lines) by merging all 48 per-resource `constraints.md` files. Organized by 7 categories (AI & ML, Compute, Data, Messaging, Monitoring, Networking, Security) with one H3 section per resource. Pairing rules are not obtainable from MCP tools and must remain static.

Added `.token-limits.json` override for this file (15000 tokens).

Files: `constraints.md` (new), `.token-limits.json` (edit).
